assertionResults.title: C01: thrown error mid-transaction causes full rollback — no partial state

assertionResults.title: C02: delayed webhook reprocessing handled by idempotency

assertionResults.title: C03: simulated settlement crash leaves no partial state

assertionResults.fullName: Chaos: Failure Scenarios C05: ledger always balanced — sum(debits) === sum(credits) per tenant
assertionResults.title: C05: ledger always balanced — sum(debits) === sum(credits) per tenant

assertionResults.title: BENCH-1: 1000 concurrent tx same tenant — p95 < 500ms, hash chain intact

assertionResults.fullName: P01: Double-entry balance invariant for any balanced line set, debitSum === creditSum after validation
assertionResults.title: for any balanced line set, debitSum === creditSum after validation

assertionResults.title: SHA-256 of identical inputs produces identical output

assertionResults.title: any positive bigint survives string serialization

assertionResults.title: any positive bigint as number string survives Zod transform

assertionResults.title: any imbalanced set is always rejected

assertionResults.title: any well-formed input parses successfully

assertionResults.title: tenantId is never present in parsed output regardless of input
